query: Can you assist in planning a 5-day travel itinerary for a party of 3 people from Manhattan heading to Texas, involving visits to 2 cities there from March 14th to March 18th, 2022? The budget for this trip stands at $3,900. We'd prefer accommodations that allow parties.

plan.accommodation: Park Slope Home away from Home (137.0, Entire home/apt, Texarkana)

plan.attraction: Texas State Line; Bringle Lake Park West; Holiday Springs Water Park; Welcome to Arkansas Sign; Welcome to Texas Sign; Texas State Line Monument; Lindsey Railroad Museum in Downtown Texarkana;
